Title: New onboarding doc available for Q3 hires
column7: Please review the updated onboarding checklist in Notion — it now includes the new security training module. Let me know if anything looks off.

Title: Should we switch CI pipeline to GitHub Actions?
column7: Anyone have strong opinions on migrating from Jenkins to GitHub Actions? We're paying a lot for the Jenkins server and maintenance is painful.

Title: Decision: use Postgres for new analytics service
column7: After comparing options we've decided to go with Postgres + TimescaleDB for the analytics pipeline. RDS m5.large in us-east-1. Docs will be updated.

Title: Idea: weekly async video standup to replace Monday call
column7: What if we recorded a 2-min Loom each Friday instead of the Monday sync? Everyone post their clip in #standup by EOD Friday.

Title: Incident post-mortem: 2026-06-18 API outage
column7: Post-mortem for last week's outage is in Confluence. Root cause was a misconfigured rate limiter. Action items assigned to infra team.

Title: How do we handle GDPR deletion requests in the data lake?
column7: We got a user deletion request but our Spark pipeline doesn't have a clean way to purge records. Who owns this? Tagging @legal and @data-eng.

Title: Launch readiness checklist for v2.4 release
column7: Sharing the launch checklist for v2.4 — sign-off needed from QA security and marketing before we tag. Deadline is EOD June 28.

Title: Idea: automated Slack digest of starred messages to email
column7: Meta idea — we could use n8n to collect all the ⭐ messages from the week and send a digest email every Friday morning. Zero manual effort.

Title: Update: staging env now mirrors prod config
column7: Staging is now back in sync with prod after last week's drift. Reminder: always deploy to staging first and smoke-test before pushing to prod.

Title: Decision: deprecate legacy REST endpoint in September
column7: We will sunset /v1/users/search on 2026-09-30. Migration guide to /v2/search is live. Partners have been notified via email.
